title: Minepiece Essentials
description: Boss timers and quest parchment reader for the MinePiece server — client-side Fabric mod.
body:
# Minepiece Essentials

  A lightweight, client-side Fabric mod for the [MinePiece](https://minepiece.fr) Minecraft server. Two passive quality-of-life
  features:

  ## Features

  ### 🕒 Boss Timers
  - Auto-tracks boss respawns per island
  - Plays a configurable sound alert when a boss is close to respawning
  - Auto-syncs boss coordinates as **Xaero's Minimap** waypoints (if installed)
  - Manual refresh button + per-island refresh queue

  ### 📜 Parchment Reader
  - Scans quest parchments in your inventory
  - Displays each parchment's objectives in a clean HUD

  ### 🎛 Draggable HUDs
  - Press **`K`** to enter edit mode
  - Drag any HUD with the mouse
  - Click outside or press **`Esc`** to save the layout

  ### 📍 Manual waypoints
  - Press **`B`** to drop a waypoint at your current position (requires Xaero's Minimap)

  ## Requirements
  - Minecraft **1.21.11**
  - Fabric Loader ≥ **0.19.2**
  - Fabric API
  - Java **21**
  - *(optional)* Xaero's Minimap

  ## Install
  Drop the `.jar` into your `.minecraft/mods/` folder.

  ## Configuration
  All settings are stored locally at `.minecraft/config/minepiece-essentials/`:
  - `config.json` — refresh intervals, alert thresholds
  - `layouts.json` — HUD positions
  - `bosses/` — saved boss timers per island
  - `waypoints/` — manual waypoints

  ## Privacy
  - 100% client-side.
  - **No account required.**
  - **No telemetry. No data collection. Nothing leaves your machine.**
  - The mod's only network interaction with the MinePiece server is sending the silent `/info` command (already available to
  every player) to refresh boss timers.

  ## Source
  Source code: https://github.com/Aure64/minepiece-essentials
